item.title: From a Monocle port to one fluent type: how telescope happened
item.description: Telescope is a Java 25 deep-copy DSL for records and POJOs. The pitch: build a path through an immutable graph, then read it, write it, update it, traverse it, convert it, or thread an effect through it — without writing copy constructors by hand and without ever typing Iso, Lens, Prism, Affine, or Traversal. The end-state example is one method-ref chain on the runtime DSL or one fluent chain on the generated navigator, both bottoming out at the same value:
